title: lantana bruchii
intro: Lantana bruchii, also known as yellow button lantana or button lantana, is a shrub-like plant native to the Americas, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Lantana bruchii can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered to alleviate its medicinal properties.
